description: Weekly competitive intelligence scan. Tracks competitor ad strategies, spots messaging shifts and new bets, diffs against last week's baseline, and posts a delta report to Slack automatically every Monday.

customize.description: The Motion workspace ID for this sandbox. Found in workspace settings or resolved via motion workspace-goal.
Human-readable workspace or brand name. Used to namespace brain files and derive the workspace slug.
URL-safe version of the workspace name — lowercase, hyphens for spaces. Derived at install time from WORKSPACE_NAME. Used as the folder name under /agent/brain/competitor-intel/.

installs.purpose: Empty watchlist seed. Populated by setup-competitor-intel on first run.
Creates the baselines directory. Baseline files are written here by each scan run.
Core competitor watch skill. Runs on schedule and on explicit trigger.
Setup and reconfiguration skill. Runs on first install; re-invokable any time.

post_install.name: Configure your competitor watchlist
post_install.description: Walks through selecting competitors, resolving them in Motion's ad library, configuring Slack delivery, and scheduling the weekly routine.

changelog.notes: Initial release. Translated from motion-creative-plugin competitor-intel MCP skill. Competitor brands tracked in workspace-scoped inspoBrands.json seed. MCP tools replaced with native motion CLI. Two-pass active portfolio pull, survival cohort analysis, weekly delta computation. Setup skill handles brand resolution, own-brand ID storage, Slack channel config, and reminder scheduling.
